Teaching

The following courses are coordinated and thought by Prof. Bert Lagaisse:

2025-2026

  • T4YDS2 – Distributed Systems
  • T3WBS2 – Operating Systems
  • T3WBS1 – Besturingssystemen
  • T2AOS2 – Object-oriented Software Development
  • T2AOS1 – Objectgerichte softwareontwikkeling
  • T4VER2 – Extended Reality

© 2026 DNet GT Lab. Site made with Jekyll; copy and modify it for your own research group.

We are part of the Group T Leuven Campus.
